name: Sukar Wasat
overview: The series sheds light on a serious problem witnessed in the Arab region, namely, the high cost of real estate, shedding light on the shocking speculations that lie at the heart of this field, causing unbridgeable cracks in the economy, and extending in effect to impact all aspects of social life.

trailers.title: برومو مسلسل سكر وسط حصريا على دراميات
